task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Kia EV6 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $42600.00 and wholesale is $36760.00. Product features: Electric crossover with up to 310-mile range and fast charging. Reference: https://www.kia.com/us/en/ev6

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Kia EV6. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Kia EV6. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
